Class Student

java.lang.Object
org.example.oopjavagroupproject.model.Student
public class Student extends Object
Represents a student entity. This class corresponds to a single row in the "students" table in the database. It holds information about the student's personal details and their faculty.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Student(int id, String fullName, String gender, String phone, Faculty faculty)
    Constructs a new Student with a specified ID (for existing students).
    Student(String fullName, String gender, String phone, Faculty faculty)
    Constructs a new Student without a specified ID (for new students).

  • Field Details

    • id

      private int id

    • fullName

      private String fullName

    • gender

      private String gender

    • faculty

      private Faculty faculty

  • Constructor Details

    • Student

      public Student(int id, String fullName, String gender, String phone, Faculty faculty)
      Constructs a new Student with a specified ID (for existing students).
      Parameters:
      id - The unique identifier of the student.
      fullName - The full name of the student.
      gender - The gender of the student.
      phone - The phone number of the student.
      faculty - The faculty the student is enrolled in.

    • Student

      public Student(String fullName, String gender, String phone, Faculty faculty)
      Constructs a new Student without a specified ID (for new students). The ID is expected to be auto-generated by the database.
      Parameters:
      fullName - The full name of the student.
      gender - The gender of the student.
      phone - The phone number of the student.
      faculty - The faculty the student is enrolled in.

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Returns the student's unique ID.
      Returns:
      The student ID.

    • setId

      public void setId(int id)
      Sets the student's unique ID.
      Parameters:
      id - The new student ID.

    • getFullName

      public String getFullName()
      Returns the student's full name.
      Returns:
      The full name.

    • setFullName

      public void setFullName(String fullName)
      Sets the student's full name.
      Parameters:
      fullName - The new full name.

    • getGender

      public String getGender()
      Returns the student's gender.
      Returns:
      The gender.

    • setGender

      public void setGender(String gender)
      Sets the student's gender.
      Parameters:
      gender - The new gender.

    • getPhone

      public String getPhone()
      Returns the student's phone number.
      Returns:
      The phone number.

    • setPhone

      public void setPhone(String phone)
      Sets the student's phone number.
      Parameters:
      phone - The new phone number.

    • getFaculty

      public Faculty getFaculty()
      Returns the Faculty object associated with the student.
      Returns:
      The student's faculty.

    • setFaculty

      public void setFaculty(Faculty faculty)
      Sets the Faculty object for the student.
      Parameters:
      faculty - The new faculty.

    • getFacultyId

      public int getFacultyId()
      A convenience method to get the faculty ID. Returns 0 if the faculty is not set.
      Returns:
      The ID of the faculty, or 0 if null.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns the string representation of the student, which is their full name. This is useful for displaying students in UI components like ComboBox.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      The student's full name.
